parameters.content:
## Meeting Intelligence: Auto-Extract Decisions and Action Items to SharePoint and Microsoft To Do

### AI-Powered Meeting Transcript Processing via Outlook

### How it works
This workflow polls Outlook every 15 minutes for meeting summary emails sent by a configured bot address, extracts strategic decisions and action items using GPT-4o, logs decisions to a SharePoint list, and creates dated tasks in Microsoft To Do all without manual intervention.

### Setup steps
- [ ] Replace `bot@yourcompany.com` in the Outlook Trigger filter with the
      actual sender address your meeting bot uses.
- [ ] Connect your Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 credential to both the Outlook
      Trigger node and the Send Error Email node. Replace
      admin@yourcompany.com in the error node with your actual admin address.
- [ ] Connect your OpenAI credential to the Extract Insights via AI node.
- [ ] Connect your Microsoft SharePoint credential to the Log to SharePoint
      List node and configure the target site and list.
- [ ] Connect your Microsoft To Do credential to the Create To Do Tasks node
      and replace YOUR_TODO_LIST_ID with your actual task list ID.
- [ ] In the Parse & Route Arrays node settings, set the number of outputs
      to 2 so the split routing works correctly.

### Required credentials
- **Microsoft Outlook OAuth2** (trigger + error email)
- **OpenAI API** (insight extraction via GPT-4o)
- **Microsoft SharePoint** (decision logging)
- **Microsoft To Do** (action item task creation)

### Notes
The deadline hour for To Do tasks defaults to 14:00 UTC (17:00 EEST).
Adjust the DEADLINE_HOUR_UTC constant in the Normalize Due Date node to
match your team's timezone.

### Trigger & Deduplication
Polls Outlook every 15 minutes for emails from the configured bot sender and drops any conversation threads already processed in a previous run.

### Action Item Task Creation
Normalizes due dates to the Microsoft Graph dateTimeTimeZone format and creates a dated To Do task for each action item with assignee and deadline.

### AI Extraction & Routing
Strips HTML from the email body, passes the clean transcript to GPT-4o to extract strategic decisions and action items, then splits the two arrays into separate output branches for independent downstream processing.

### Decision Logging
Logs each extracted strategic decision as a new item in the configured SharePoint list for permanent team-level record keeping.

### Error Handling
Global error catcher that intercepts any node failure and sends a formatted alert email to the configured admin address with the workflow error details.
